dc_title_s: Roads and ROW Winnebago County, WI 2026
dc_description_s: This data represents roads and Right Of Ways (ROW) for Winnebago County, Wisconsin in 2026.[ROADS: Street Centerlines for Winnebago Co., WI. Includes county, state, and U.S. highways, town roads, city streets and private roads. Used by planning, zoning, highway, property lister, 911, and emergency government departments, and also the public and private sector. The street centerline file was saved to a file called gm_ctr.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
